products.name: Weather Monitoring System
products.description: A fully assembled weather monitoring station built on Arduino Mega 2560. Features DHT22 for temperature & humidity, BMP280 for barometric pressure, LDR for light intensity, and a 20x4 I2C LCD display. Comes with a premium acrylic base, pre-programmed ROM, and 9V adapter.
features: Includes 9V adapter and source code USB

products.name: bluetooth controlled car
products.description: A 4-wheel drive RC robot car controlled via Bluetooth from any Android phone. Built on Arduino Uno with L298N motor driver, HC-05 Bluetooth module, and 4x DC geared motors.

products.name: smart dustbin system
products.description: An automatic lid-opening dustbin using an Arduino Nano, HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor, and SG90 servo motor.

products.name: line follower robot car
products.description: A two-wheel differential drive robot that follows a black line on a white surface. Uses 3 IR sensor array.

products.name: WiFi Controlled RC Robot Car (Arduino + ESP8266)
products.description: Control this 4WD robot car over WiFi from any browser.

products.name: Arduino OLED Digital Clock with DS3231 RTC
products.description: A precise digital clock using DS3231 Real Time Clock module and 0.96 inch OLED display.

products.name: raspberry pi4 desktop kit
products.description: An autonomous robot with computer vision capabilities powered by Raspberry Pi 4 (8GB). Uses Pi Camera Module v2 with OpenCV.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Retro Gaming Console (RetroPie)
products.description: A complete retro gaming setup using a Raspberry Pi 4 (4GB) with RetroPie pre-installed.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Home Media Center (LibreELEC)
products.description: Turn your TV into a smart media center. Supports 4K video playback.

products.name: Raspberry Pi NAS Server (OpenMediaVault)
products.description: A network-attached storage server built on Raspberry Pi 4 (4GB) with OpenMediaVault.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Smart Mirror
products.description: A two-way mirror display powered by Raspberry Pi 4 that shows time, weather, calendar, and news headlines.

products.name: wifi home automation
products.description: Control 4 AC appliances from your phone over WiFi. Comes with a built-in web dashboard.

products.name: ESP32-CAM WiFi Security Camera
products.description: A tiny WiFi security camera using ESP32-CAM module. Streams 720p video over WiFi with motion detection.

products.name: WiFi Smart Plug Socket (ESP8266)
products.description: A smart WiFi plug that lets you control any AC appliance remotely.

products.name: NodeMCU IoT Weather Station with ThingSpeak
products.description: An IoT weather station that uploads real-time data to ThingSpeak cloud.

products.name: ESP32 Bluetooth + WiFi Controlled RC Car
products.description: A dual-mode RC car controllable via both Bluetooth and WiFi.

products.name: 10K Ohm 1/4W Metal Film Resistor (Pack of 100)
products.description: High quality metal film resistors. 10K Ohm, 1/4 Watt, 1% tolerance.

products.name: Breadboard 830 Points Solderless (Full Size)
products.description: Full-size solderless breadboard with 830 tie points.

products.name: DHT11 Temperature & Humidity Sensor Module
products.description: Digital temperature and humidity sensor module with built-in pull-up resistor.

products.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
products.description: Ultrasonic ranging module for measuring distances from 2cm to 400cm.

products.name: Arduino Uno R3 Clone (CH340 USB)
products.description: ATmega328P based Arduino Uno R3 compatible board.

products.name: SG90 Micro Servo Motor 9g
products.description: Micro servo motor with 180° rotation range. Torque: 1.8 kg/cm at 4.8V.

products.name: Jumper Wires Male-to-Male (40 pcs, 20cm)
products.description: Bundle of 40 premium jumper wires with male-to-male pin headers.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Intruder Security System
products.description: Smart security system using Pi camera and PIR motion sensors to detect intruders and send email/SMS alerts.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Obstacle Avoiding Robot
products.description: Advanced 4WD robot with Pi 4, utilizing ultrasonic sensors and OpenCV for autonomous pathfinding and obstacle avoidance.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Smart Agricultural System
products.description: Automated irrigation and monitoring node with soil moisture, DHT11, and automated water pump relays.

products.name: ESP Home Automation System
products.description: Complete smart home board featuring 8 relay modules to control lights and fans via WiFi or local web dashboard.

products.name: ESP Industrial Security System
products.description: Robust security monitoring node using ESP32 with RFID door lock, alarm buzzer, and cloud logging.

products.name: ESP WiFi RC Car
products.description: Rapid prototype RC car controllable via a local web server hosted directly on the ESP8266 node.

products.name: Raspberry Pi Smart Door Lock System
products.description: Advanced facial recognition and RFID door lock system with remote monitoring capabilities.

products.name: Arduino Fire Fighting Robot
products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.name: Smart Parking System
products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.name: Smart Garbage Segregation System
products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.name: Intelligent Traffic Light System
products.description: New prototype placeholder

products.name: Arduino Flood Alert System
products.description: An automated early warning prototype designed to track rising water levels. Upon detecting critical thresholds, this system logs data and automatically triggers loud sirens and indicator LEDs to save lives and property.

products.name: Smart Irrigation Control
products.description: Optimize water usage with this smart agricultural prototype. The system uses a soil moisture sensor to dynamically monitor dry dirt and automatically activates a miniature 5V water pump only when the plants absolutely need hydration.

products.name: Gas Leakage Alert System
products.description: A critical safety device utilizing the highly sensitive MQ-2 gas sensor. It sniffs the ambient air for dangerous concentrations of LPG, methane, or smoke, immediately halting potential disasters with audio-visual warnings and auto-shutoff relays.

products.name: Earthquake Detection System
products.description: An advanced early warning Arduino prototype designed to detect tectonic movements and structural vibrations. Leveraging a highly sensitive 6-axis MPU6050 accelerometer, the system filters out background noise and instantly triggers loud audio-visual alarms alongside a digital LCD readout when significant seismic thresholds are breached, ensuring critical early evacuation.

products.name: Smart Medicine Reminder
products.description: Never miss a dosage again. This Arduino-driven pillbox relies on RTC (Real-Time Clock) synchronization to visually highlight and unlock specific medicine compartments exactly when the patient's prescription schedule dictates.

products.name: Remote Health Monitoring IoT
products.description: Bridge the gap between patient and doctor. This IoT framework reads live vitals (Pulse & SpO2) through specialized sensors and pipes the packets over a Wi-Fi module directly to a secure online cloud dashboard accessible by medical staff.

products.name: Smart Toll Gate Automation
products.description: A miniaturized logistics prototype designed for smooth traffic ticketing. Utilizing RFID tags and readers, the Arduino scans passing cars, deducts virtual currency from their account, and physically raises the toll barrier servo without requiring the driver to stop.

products.name: ESP32-CAM Live Surveillance Robot
products.description: A versatile remote surveillance rover logic build. Deploying the ESP32-CAM, this robot connects seamlessly to your local internet and pipes a live camera feed straight to a customized dashboard, allowing you to drive it manually via web buttons.

products.name: Face Security System
products.description: A smart home authorization module prototype. When a visitor approaches, the system snaps a high-res photograph and cross-references an internal database, automatically unlocking a 12V physical door deadbolt if a pre-approved face is matched.

products.name: Smart Fertilizer Spraying System
products.description: Targeted agriculture automation relies on this node. Using precise timing algorithms and environmental sensors, this smart spraying tank selectively distributes fluid nutrients across soil beds only when optimally required, conserving resources.

products.name: Livestock Monitoring System
products.description: Track thousands of animals reliably through centralized IoT endpoints. This wearable collar prototype uploads vital telemetry arrays to the cloud via the nearest Wi-Fi node, giving farmers a bird's eye map of their entire flock's health and location.

products.name: Smart Farm Robot
products.description: A mobile agricultural assistant built to traverse uneven terrain. The robot autonomously halts to analyze the soil chemical make-up and uploads the diagnostics, ensuring precision farm data can be processed on the backend server.

products.name: Smart Wheel Chair
products.description: A mobility accessibility prototype giving control back to the patient. Utilizing smart network processing, the chair can be driven traditionally via joystick, remotely supervised by a nurse application, or natively run using intuitive head/hand tilts.

products.name: Arduino UNO R3 Board
products.description: The flagship Arduino board. Perfectly suited for diving into electronics and coding. If this is your first experience tinkering with the platform, the UNO is the most robust board you can start playing with.

products.name: Arduino Nano V3
products.description: A small, complete, and breadboard-friendly board based on the ATmega328. It has more or less the same functionality of the Arduino DUEMILANOVE, but in a different package. It lacks only a DC power jack.

products.name: Arduino MEGA 2560
products.description: Designed for highly complex projects. With 54 digital input/output pins, 16 analog inputs, and a larger space for your sketch, it is the recommended board for 3D printers and robotics projects.

products.name: DHT11 Temp & Humidity Sensor
products.description: A basic, ultra low-cost digital temperature and humidity sensor. It uses a capacitive humidity sensor and a thermistor to measure the surrounding air, spitting out a digital signal on the data pin.

products.name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor
products.description: Provides 2cm to 400cm of non-contact measurement functionality with a ranging accuracy that can reach up to 3mm. Essential for obstacle-avoiding robots and distance calculation.

products.name: IR Infrared Obstacle Sensor
products.description: An infrared obstacle avoidance sensor module widely used in robot obstacle avoidance, obstacle avoidance car, line count, and black and white line tracking.

products.name: MQ Series Gas Sensor (Multi-type)
products.description: Ideal for detecting LPG, i-butane, propane, methane, alcohol, Hydrogen, smoke. These sensors are widely utilized in domestic gas leakage alarms and industrial combustible gas detectors.

products.name: Soil Moisture Sensor Probe
products.description: A simple water sensor that can be used to detect soil moisture. Perfect for automatic plant watering systems. When the soil moisture deficit, the sensor outputs a HIGH signal.

products.name: Neo-6M GPS Module
products.description: A versatile GPS module providing highly accurate location tracking data. Integrating perfectly with microcontrollers over serial, it's the foundational core for drone navigation and asset tracking.

products.name: SIM800L GSM Module
products.description: A miniature cellular module allowing your microcontrollers to connect to mobile networks. Send SMS texts, execute phone calls, or transfer lightweight GPRS data packages.

products.name: RC522 RFID Reader Module
products.description: A highly integrated reader/writer IC for contactless communication. Utilize this module to build intelligent digital locks, attendance systems, and ID scanners.

products.name: L298N Motor Driver Module
products.description: The beating heart of robotic movement. The L298N module can control the speed and direction of two DC motors simultaneously, comfortably handling higher voltage draws from external batteries.

products.name: BO DC Gear Motors (Pair)
products.description: Battery Operated (BO) DC Motors provide solid torque at low speeds. Essential for hobbyist 2WD and 4WD robotic automobile chassis builds.

products.name: 830 Tie-Points Breadboard
products.description: The foundational canvas for electronics prototyping. Build and test robust circuits safely without messy soldering. Features standard dual power rails for clean voltage distribution.

products.name: Assorted 5mm LEDs (Multi-color pac)
products.description: Illuminate your prototypes with visual status signals. A standard pack of highly reliable, long-lasting 5mm Light Emitting Diodes perfect for learning basic circuit resistance.

products.name: Active Piezo Buzzers
products.description: Integrate auditory alerts into your systems. Because these are active buzzers, simply supplying them with standard 5V DC power will immediately generate a loud, continuous frequency tone.

products.name: Dupont Jumper Wires (M-M, M-F, F-F)
products.description: High quality standardized jumper wires for breadboarding and module interfacing. Essential connectors available as Male-to-Male, Male-to-Female, and Female-to-Female to bridge any gap.

products.name: ESP32 Wi-Fi & Bluetooth Dual-Core
products.description: The flagship IoT microcontroller. The ESP32 is a powerful, generic Wi-Fi+BT+BLE MCU module that targets a wide variety of applications, ranging from low-power sensor networks to the most demanding tasks, such as voice encoding and music streaming.

products.name: ESP8266 NodeMCU CP2102
products.description: A highly integrated Wi-Fi SoC solution to meet users' continuous demands for efficient power usage, compact design and reliable performance in the IoT industry. Ideal for smart home sensor bridges.
features: 10 GPIO, every GPIO can be PWM/I2C/1-wire

products.name: ESP32-CAM Development Board with OV2640
products.description: A small-size camera module. The ESP32-CAM can be widely used in various IoT applications. It is suitable for home smart devices, industrial wireless control, wireless monitoring, and IoT security solutions.
